title: Atom
description:
Atom is a optimization modpack that aims to create the perfect, yet not drastic, performance optimization pack there is.

It aims to strip Minecraft to its absolute bare-minimum, and still have a playable style. 

All downloads are appreciated!
body:
# Introduction

The **Atom Modpack** is an **experimental** modpack, featuring the **most effective** mods in terms of **optimizing Minecraft**. The pack itself is not ready and expects **bugs or crashes**. 

## Use

The **Atom Modpack** provides a highly optimized version of Minecraft, which aims to provide the best possible performance, and maybe break the game itself and strip it from some components:

- reworked **light engine**;

- a new and **optimized rendering engine** (Vulkan);

- **general optimizations**, regarding culling and loading times. 

### Statistics

By my own tests, using my own hardware, I was able to achieve a more-than **730 FPS boost**! It really might be dependent on the actual resources of every system, but the **Vulkan** rendering system is compatible with almost every modern desktop PC.

P. S. : All of the mods added are stated in the "**dependencies**" tab of every version of the modpack, if some are interested into looking at their respective use.
